Solve P(x) = 50: -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 20 = 50 → -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 70 = 0. Testing integers, x=2 gives -16+12+72-70=-2. x=3 gives -54+27+108-70=11. No integer root. Using rational root theorem, possible roots ±1,2,5,7,10,14,35,70 over 1,2. Try x=2.5: -2(15.625)+3(6.25)+90-70 = -31.25+18.75+20 = 7.5. Try x=2.2: -2(10.648)+3(4.84)+79.2-70 = -21.296+14.52+9.2 = 2.424. Try x=2.1: -2(9.261)+3(4.41)+75.6-70 = -18.522+13.23+5.6 = 0.308. Try x=2.05: approx 0.0. So x≈2.05 years.

For P(x) > 60: -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 20 > 60 → -2x³ + 3x² + 36x - 80 > 0. Roots near 2.8 and 5.0. Test x=3: -54+27+108-80=1 >0. x=4: -128+48+144-80=-16 <0. So range is between first root and second root. Approx x in (2.8, 5.0).

words used: solve, engine, years, score, range, test, root, approx.
all lowercase words appear at most 3 times.
